## edu-cli learning-plan list

List learning plans (学习计划列表)

```
edu-cli learning-plan list [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --class-id uint      Filter by class ID
  -h, --help               help for list
      --page int           Page number (default 1)
      --page-size int      Page size (default 20)
      --plan-type string   Filter by plan type (long/mid/short)
      --user-id uint       Filter by user ID
```
